title: Mace Control
description: MaceControl puts the power in your hands to completely customize how maces work on your server! Tired of maces being too overpowered? This plugin lets you set limits on the total number of maces that can exist in your world.
body:
**Mace Control** adds a bunch of useful commands to limit balance or remove maces from your server! Whether you're looking to fine tune gameplay or eliminate maces entirely.
This could also be very helpful if you are trying to start a SMP.

Found a bug? Join my Discord server and let me know how to reproduce it will get it fixed ASAP!

**Commands:**
```/maceset MAX or ENCHANTABLE```
```/macereset: resets all crafted maces```
```/macefind: finds all crafted maces```
